name: Decade Resources Ltd.
summary: Decade Resources Ltd., an exploration stage company, engages in the acquisition, exploration, and evaluation of mineral properties in Canada. The company holds a 65% interest in the Red Cliff property with 8 claims located in north-western British Columbia; and 35 mineral claims making up a copper/gold property situated near Kitimat, British Columbia, as well as holds an oil and gas license in British Columbia. It also has an option to acquire a 100% interest in the Silver Crown property consisting of one claims adjoining the Red Cliff property to the north. The company was incorporated in 2006 and is headquartered in Stewart, Canada.
